title: What Programs would you like to see in 2019?
excerpt: The most recent edition of the footwork & movement clinic seems really popular but what else would you like to see? More fitness training alongside your squash training? Drop-in drills classes? Something else we’ve never offered? Let us know below!
content: The most recent edition of the footwork & movement clinic seems really popular but what else would you like to see? More fitness training alongside your squash training?  Drop-in drills classes? Something else we’ve never offered? Let us know below!
